seoTitle: How to Edit Your GoDaddy Website Using Built-In AI Tools
metaDescription: Learn how beginners can use GoDaddy's built-in AI tools to edit website text, layout, and color schemes without any coding experience needed.
intro: GoDaddy's website builder now includes AI features that can rewrite text, suggest headlines, and adjust layouts without requiring any coding knowledge. This guide is aimed at beginners who want to make fast, polished edits to a personal blog or small business site. You'll learn how to open the website editor and put the built-in AI tools to work on your content and design.

steps.heading: Log in and open the website editor
steps.body: Sign in to your GoDaddy account and open your site in the website builder to access the editing tools.

steps.heading: Use AI to rewrite or generate text
steps.body: Select a text section and use the AI writing tool to rewrite copy or auto-generate headlines for your pages.

steps.heading: Adjust layout and color schemes
steps.body: Use the builder's AI-assisted suggestions to update your site's layout and color palette to match your brand.

steps.heading: Customize individual site sections
steps.body: Go section by section, applying AI content suggestions where they fit and adjusting manually where you want more control.

steps.heading: Preview and publish your changes
steps.body: Review how the edited site looks before publishing so your visitors see the polished, updated version.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to use GoDaddy's AI editing tools?
faq.answer: No, the AI features are built into the website builder specifically so beginners can make edits without touching any code.

faq.question: Can GoDaddy's AI write all my website content for me?
faq.answer: It can generate and rewrite text and headlines as a starting point, but most site owners still review and adjust the AI's suggestions to match their voice.

faq.question: Is the AI website editor included in all GoDaddy plans?
faq.answer: AI editing features are part of GoDaddy's website builder, so availability depends on which builder plan your site is using.

faq.question: Can I undo changes made with GoDaddy's AI tools?
faq.answer: Yes, you can revise or replace any AI-generated text or layout change the same way you would edit content manually.
